chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2878 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 14894/2022 2. For order as to maintainability of instant petition 06.08.2025 This is an old case of 2022, which is over 03 years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 18.08.2022, none was present on behalf of the petitioner without intimation. On the said date, learned counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy this Court about maintainability of this petition, but despite lapse of 03 years, today none appeared for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition. It is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with all listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
